REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amy Harrington appeared via zoom for Glenn Martin Leong (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Glenn Martin Leong is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 04, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-02-2024 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
